description: Browse what you could buy. Returns names, prices, and categories.

args.name: category
args.description: Category filter: 'all' (default) or a FunctionFlags-derived name (seating, surfaces, appliances, electronics, plumbing, decorative, misc, lighting)

args.name: request_id
args.description: Optional correlation ID. When set, the response frame carries this ID so the caller can match response to request.
